items.subject: GRB shelter at 80% — need overnight coverage
items.snippet: George R. Brown is filling fast. We need EMT + intake overnight in Zone 4. Please confirm staffing by 8 PM.

items.subject: Zone 5 access
items.snippet: Reminder: Katy corridor is credentials-only tonight. Don't send non-credentialed drivers that way.

items.subject: Supply run — tomorrow 7 AM
items.snippet: Pallets of water + cots staged at Annex. Need two CDL drivers confirmed tonight.
